HEADING: Ratings & Reviews Setup
INTRO: This wizard will guide you through setting up ratings & reviews. This page will auto update as you complete each step.
STEP1_DESCRIPTION: Choose your star rating and any sub-questions visitors will answer when leaving a review. You can pick from preset question types like stars, thumbs, sliders, or build your own.
STEP2_HEADING: Create or update a Widget Configuration
STEP2_DESCRIPTION: Open the customizer, create or edit a Widget Configuration, and check 'Enable Ratings or Other Questions'. You can scope each configuration to a URL pattern (e.g. mysite.com/products/*) so reviews only appear on the right pages.
STEP3_SHOPIFY_DESCRIPTION: In your Shopify theme editor, add the FastComments - Reviews Summary block to a section on the page where you want to show the rollup star rating. Once added in the editor, this step auto-checks.
STEP3_SHOPIFY_BUTTON: How to add a block (Shopify docs)
STEP3_GENERIC_DESCRIPTION: Add the snippet below to any page where you want to show the rollup star rating. The widget loads asynchronously and takes care of the rest.
STEP3_NA: Connect a Shopify store to auto-detect this step.
